phrases.english: Please take me to this address.
phrases.pinyin: Qing dai wo qu zhe ge di zhi.
phrases.use: Show this to a taxi or ride-hailing driver.

phrases.english: I have a reservation under this name.
phrases.chinese: 我用这个名字预订了房间。
phrases.pinyin: Wo yong zhe ge ming zi yu ding le fang jian.

phrases.english: Do you have an English menu?
phrases.pinyin: Ni men you Ying wen cai dan ma?

phrases.english: I lost my passport. Please help me contact the police.
phrases.chinese: 我的护照丢了，请帮我联系警察。
phrases.pinyin: Wo de hu zhao diu le, qing bang wo lian xi jing cha.

phrases.chinese: 这个价格可以便宜一点吗？
phrases.pinyin: Zhe ge jia ge ke yi pian yi yi dian ma?
